mapper.sql: ID, APPLY_DATE, BEGIN_DATE, WORK_DAYS, END_DATE, PROC_INST_ID, REASON, STATUS, USER_ID, VAC_TYPE
mapper.insert:
insert into t_vacation (ID, APPLY_DATE, BEGIN_DATE, WORK_DAYS, END_DATE, PROC_INST_ID, REASON, STATUS, USER_ID, VAC_TYPE) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

insert into t_vacation
ID,
APPLY_DATE,
BEGIN_DATE,
WORK_DAYS,
END_DATE,
PROC_INST_ID,
REASON,
STATUS,
USER_ID,
VAC_TYPE,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
update t_vacation
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE},
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
WORK_DAYS = #{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
VAC_TYPE = #{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_vacation set APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, WORK_DAYS = #{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, VAC_TYPE = #{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_vacation
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
WORK_DAYS = #{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
VAC_TYPE = #{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
order by priority

select count(*) from t_vacation
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
WORK_DAYS = #{workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
VAC_TYPE = #{vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from t_vacation
APPLY_DATE = #{model.applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{model.beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
WORK_DAYS = #{model.workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
END_DATE = #{model.endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{model.procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{model.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{model.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{model.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
VAC_TYPE = #{model.vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
AND ( status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or vacType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by priority
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_vacation
APPLY_DATE = #{model.applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{model.beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
WORK_DAYS = #{model.workDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
END_DATE = #{model.endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{model.procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{model.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{model.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{model.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
VAC_TYPE = #{model.vacType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
AND ( status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or vacType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
